teaser: Annual bank stress test shows large banks can withstand severe recession with sufficient capital and meet minimum requirements. Lessons learned from 2023 crisis. Higher losses due to riskier balance sheets and expenses. All 31 banks above minimum capital. Increased credit card losses and riskier corporate credit portfolios. CRE exposure remains a focus.
teaserText: Annual bank stress test shows large banks can withstand severe recession with sufficient capital and meet minimum requirements. Lessons learned from 2023 crisis. Higher losses due to riskier balance sheets and expenses. All 31 banks above minimum capital. Increased credit card losses and riskier corporate credit portfolios. CRE exposure remains a focus.
title: Fed Stress Test 2024: Large Banks Face Greater Losses But Maintain Strong Capital Positions In Severe Recession Scenario (CORRECTED)
